title: Simple Conveyors
body:
Unoriginal yet very useful ; This is a FABRIC mod, which adds simple conveyors for transporting items and entities. Requires the Fabric API.

Features : Conveyors :
- Face in the direction that the player faces when they are being placed
- Convey entities or items along the direction they face
- If an entity collides with the side of a conveyor block, and the conveyor belt is facing up on that side, then the entity or item will be pulled up 
- Can be powered to increase speed, as conveyors are slow when unpowered
- The speed scales with the redstone level being received
